name: Green Onion and Celery Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the green onions and celery in butter until tender.
2. Pour the mixture into a dish.
3. Cook the rice in chicken broth until it is half done.
4. Pour the cooked rice over the celery and onions.
5. Add sage and black pepper to the casserole.
6. Bake for 40 minutes at 350°F until the rice is tender.
